why_no_full_table: ADR Table A is an official copyrighted publication; the bundle avoids reproducing the full table.
PDF Table A is wide and extraction-prone; column-shift validation is mandatory.
For production, use a licensed/open structured dataset or internal ingestion from official PDFs without redistributing the full table.
known_limitations: No full UN-number substance table is included in this framework bundle.
Carrier-specific acceptance such as UPS precheck is not legal ADR acceptance.
This bundle is safety/compliance metadata only; it does not provide handling instructions or procurement guidance for dangerous substances.
